name: Option Alpha
description_short: Options trading automation platform with visual bot builder, backtesting, SmartPricing, and extensive free education for systematic options sellers.
description_long:
Option Alpha is a unique options trading platform focused on automating options selling strategies through a visual, no-code bot builder. Founded by Kirk Du Plessis, the platform has evolved from a popular options education site into a comprehensive automation platform that helps traders build, backtest, and deploy mechanical options strategies.

The platform's standout feature is the Autotrading Bot Builder, which lets traders create automated options strategies using a visual flowchart interface — no coding required. Traders can set entry criteria (Delta, DTE, IV Rank), position sizing, adjustment rules, and exit criteria, then backtest the strategy against historical data before deploying it live through connected broker accounts.

Option Alpha includes SmartPricing (algorithmic order management that works limit orders between bid/ask), a comprehensive position management dashboard, and one of the largest free options education libraries in the industry with over 200 video courses. The platform connects to major brokers including Interactive Brokers and Tradier for live automated execution. The free tier provides education and basic tools, while the Pro plan ($99/mo) unlocks automation, backtesting, and SmartPricing.
pros: No-code visual bot builder for options automation
cons: Focused exclusively on options selling strategies
Pro plan at $99/mo is a significant cost
Limited broker integrations (IB and Tradier primarily)
Backtesting data may not capture all market conditions
Not suitable for directional or buying strategies
scraped_features: Trade Ideas — continuous market scanning (9:35am-3:55pm) ranking opportunities by Expected Value (EV) and Reward/Risk ratios
0DTE Oracle — analyzes 0DTE and next-day trading opportunities using 1-year of intraday minute data backtesting
Visual Bot Builder — create and automate trading strategies without coding
Unlimited Backtesting — test and optimize options strategies before trading
Position Automations — automated entry, exit, profit-taking, and stop-loss management
Multi-leg Option Analysis — examines all option series expiring in 45 days or less with delta values from 0.50 to 0.10
Portfolio Integration — scan current open positions for opportunities
unique_selling_points: Free access for TradeStation and Tradier users (no paid subscription needed)
0DTE Oracle uses backtesting against 1 year of intraday data to validate 0DTE trades instead of relying on probability estimates
Trade Ideas uses proprietary Expected Value (EV) and Alpha metrics to rank opportunities from thousands of position setups
Complete user control over bot behavior — no automated trading without explicit permission
Educational focus — includes Option Alpha Fast Track onboarding program
